text: Bitcoin and major altcoins are up 1.6–3.3% over the past day, but the Fear & Greed Index remains at 12 (Extreme Fear) with no improvement over a week, signaling that sentiment hasn't recovered despite the modest price gains. Bitcoin dominance at 56.4% suggests investors are rotating cautiously into larger-cap assets rather than taking broad risk-on positions. The modest 24-hour volume of $82B relative to the price moves indicates thin conviction behind these gains.
